path_conditioned_encoding_law.core_statement: Encoding is not only a concept state. It is a concept state plus the admissible path that allows safe transport into memory, relation, and readout.
path_conditioned_encoding_law.high_level_form: Enc_path(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) = (E_c, Omega^(f_c)_upd, Omega^(f_c)_read, Tau_readout(c, mode_1 -> mode_2), chi_A, chi_M)
path_conditioned_encoding_law.path_open_indicator: Pi_path(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) = 1[Delta in A(I)] * 1[trajectory subset of M_feas(I)] * 1[Tau_readout(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) > 0]
path_conditioned_encoding_law.switching_aware_readout_form: Tau_readout(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) = Tau_read^(f_c) + Phi(mode_1 -> mode_2) - switch_cost(c, mode_1, mode_2)
path_conditioned_encoding_law.system_link: Sys(I) = (I, A(I), M_feas(I), F, Q, R)

layer_interpretation.state_layer: E_c gives the concept entry on the family-patched object atlas
layer_interpretation.operator_layer: Omega^(f_c)_upd and Omega^(f_c)_read determine which local directions can be safely traversed
layer_interpretation.transport_layer: Tau_readout(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) determines whether object state can reach readout under switching
layer_interpretation.constraint_layer: chi_A and chi_M enforce admissibility and viability along the path

apple.path_open_condition: Delta in A(I) AND trajectory subset of M_feas(I) AND Tau_readout(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) > 0

mathematical_meaning.core_answer: A usable encoding is no longer a static address. It is an atlas entry plus an admissible, phase-conditioned transport path.
why_it_matters: explains why object manifold existence alone does not guarantee successful readout
ties concept identity to local operator blocks and switching-aware transport
lets engineering prune P3 by path openness instead of broader geometric heuristics

verdict.core_answer: The theory track can now rewrite 'encoding-as-path' as a formal path-conditioned encoding law rather than only a qualitative intuition.
verdict.next_theory_target: promote this law into a full path-conditioned readout and bridge-lift framework
